display_text: Pollywog Charm, Tier 1: Neutral item that can be cast on an ally to increase their health regeneration by 8 HP/s for 14 seconds. While the blessed unit is standing in water, they also gain 10% bonus movement speed. Provides no attributes. Stats: CD: 45s, Duration: 14s.
